prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KARAOKEMACHINE-PARENT Product Type: KARAOKE_MACHINE Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: RockStar Kids Karaoke Singing Music Machine Flashing Lights Sound (2 Colors) Description: KidPlay Products Super Star Kids IPhone Android MP3 Supported Karaoke Stand and Microphone is great for your budding musical artist.

This set has an amplifier built into the adjustable microphone stand, that also lights up with flashing colored LED lights to complete the on stage experience when the curtain comes up. The KidPlay Products Super Star Kids Karaoke Stand has the ability to connect to Apple iPhones, Samsung and Android devices and other MP3 supported devices, with the built-in jack and speaker, and has a telescopic height of up to 32.25 inches

The KidPlay Products Super Star Kids Karaoke Stand is battery-operated, has its own songs, cheers, and easily portable. There's auxiliary input for smartphones or tablets so kids can sing along with any music they want turning this into a full childrens karaoke machine

With this gift, you'll be able to enjoy a concert put on by your child without leaving the comforts of your living room. It's great to give as a Christmas gift or stocking stuffer, party favor,. With its easily portable design you can easily put this in your child's backpack, suitcase or duffel bag to take along with you while traveling. Search Terms: karaoke machine singing girls toys light up pretend play for playing toy machine instrument singing Features: - COMPATIBILITY: Able to Connect with Apple IPhone, Android Phones, and Any MP3 Device with Audio Jack; Built in Speaker - ENDLESS ENTERTAINMENT: Enjoy Hours of Fun with your Own in Home Karaoke Machine with Dazzling Lights and Sounds that will Entertain any Sleep Over or Birthday Party. - LIGHTS AND SOUNDS: Flashing Lights, Crowd Applause, and Built-in Songs all with a Push of a Button - FUN FOR ALL AGES: This Superstar Karaoke Machine is the Ideal Present for your Budding Superstar no Matter what Age Since the Unit Features an Adjustable Height Microphone Stand Allowing Easy Use for Everyone. Fun and Interactive Enjoyment for the Entire Family on Game Nights - SPECIFICATIONS: Operates on 3 AA Batteries Not Included; Adjustable Volume Control; Available in Pink and Blue; Adjustable Stand (15.75" - 32.25"); Auxiliary Cord and Built-In MP3 Jack Included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: KidPlay Products Kids Karaoke Machine with Microphone Stand
